docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE ON GREEN CARD** SERVED AUG-23-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-03-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUSTIN REYNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SURAJ RAJWANI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT SIGN THE RETURN MAIL CAR THAT IS ONE FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
